title: ‘Pray We Make It Through the Night’: Iran’s Capital Under Siege
summary_full: Many residents of Tehran managed to get out of town when the U.S. and Israel attack began, but others who could not described living under bombardment.
summary_public: Many residents of Tehran managed to get out of town when the U.S. and Israel attack began, but others who could not described living under bombardment.
